title: 1.20-1.21.11 Full Completion
description: Adds advancements for EVERYTHING added from 1.20 to 1.21.11.
body:
This datapack adds many new advancements, each one relating to a feature that was added in a certain version. Every version from 1.20 to 1.21.11 (that adds new items or blocks) is included.

- 1.20 (Trails & Tales) has 9 advancements.
- 1.20.5 (Armored Paws) has 3 advancements.
- 1.21 (Tricky Trials) has 18 advancements.
- 1.21.2 (Bundles of Bravery) has 4 advancements.
- 1.21.4 (The Garden Awakens) has 6 advancements.
- 1.21.5 (Spring to Life) has 7 advancements.
- 1.21.6 (Chase the Skies) has 8 advancements.
- 1.21.9 (The Copper Age) has 9 advancements.
- 1.21.11 (Mounts of Mayhem) has 17 advancements.
